headline: Lamb Weston: The Shareholder Activists And Recent Insider Buying Keep Me Bullish
summary: Lamb Weston Holdings, Inc. stock: activist stakes (Starboard/Jana), insider buying, and cost cuts may drive upside despite macro risks. Click for this LW update.
